name: Pricing table
when_to_use: 需要让读者一眼比较 2–4 个套餐的价格、计费周期和核心权益时用它：适合产品定价页、方案建议、服务包交付和采购摘要。若重点是逐项审计大量能力差异，应改用 comparison-table；若需要结账、切换币种并把选择回传给 AI，则应使用带业务逻辑的专用交互界面。
why_valuable: 定价比较的判断依赖视觉层级而不只是表格数据；本模板把价格、周期、推荐档位和 included／excluded／partial 权益统一成可扫读的卡片，并在窄屏自动重排，避免推荐标识、卡片高度和深色主题各自失真。

data_in.note: data 是 plan-major 的定价比较：plans 中每个对象是一张套餐卡，features 是该套餐内按顺序展示的权益。建议提供 2–4 个 plans，并只设置零或一个 highlight:true；模板允许更多卡片但会自然换行。price 使用已格式化字符串，因此货币符号、免费或定制报价都可直接表达；period 省略时不保留空位。features.state 默认为 included，partial 使用琥珀色提示，excluded 使用红色叉号；所有文本均以 textContent 渲染。

schema.title?: string —— 区块标题；省略时显示 “Plans for every stage”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 标题下的一句比较说明；省略时显示套餐数量摘要
schema.plans: {name:string,description?:string,price:string,period?:string,badge?:string,highlight?:boolean,features:{label:string,state?:'included'|'excluded'|'partial',note?:string}[]}[] —— 套餐数组；highlight:true 强调推荐卡，badge 是其顶部短标签；features.state 默认 included

_planFields.name: string —— 套餐名称
_planFields.description?: string —— 套餐适用对象或定位短句
_planFields.price: string —— 已格式化价格，例如 “$24”／“Free”／“Custom”
_planFields.period?: string —— 价格周期，例如 “/ user / month”
_planFields.badge?: string —— highlight 卡顶部标签；highlight:true 且省略时显示 “Most popular”
_planFields.highlight?: boolean —— 是否以强调色边框和顶部标签突出

_featureFields.label: string —— 权益主文本
_featureFields.state?: 'included'|'excluded'|'partial' —— 默认 included；分别显示绿色 ✓、红色 ✗、琥珀色 Partial 语义
_featureFields.note?: string —— 权益下方的简短限定说明

spec.note: 按标题和最长套餐卡自然增高；桌面端以自适应列并排，窄屏自动折为单列。无 vh、固定容器高度或载体尺寸测量。

example._why: 三档 SaaS 套餐同时覆盖免费、按月计费、推荐档位和 included／partial／excluded 三种权益语义，可完整检验卡片等高、视觉强调与窄屏重排。

minimal.title: Choose the right workspace
minimal.subtitle: Start free, then add collaboration and control as your team grows.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For personal projects and early ideas.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: For teams shipping together every week.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；套餐卡不创建选择状态，也不向 AI 回传任何值。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified

en.when_to_use: Use it when readers need to compare the price, billing period, and core benefits of 2-4 plans at a glance: suitable for product pricing pages, proposals, service-package deliverables, and procurement summaries. If the focus is auditing many feature differences item by item, use comparison-table instead; if users must check out, switch currency, and send their selection back to AI, use a dedicated interactive interface with business logic.
en.why_valuable: Pricing decisions depend on visual hierarchy, not only tabular data. This template unifies price, period, recommended tier, and included/excluded/partial benefits in scannable cards and automatically reflows on narrow screens, preventing recommendation markers, card height, and dark theme from drifting independently.

data_in.note: data is a plan-major pricing comparison: each object in plans is one plan card, with features listed in display order. Prefer 2-4 plans and set highlight:true on zero or one plan; more cards are allowed and wrap naturally. price is a preformatted string, so currency symbols, Free, or Custom can be expressed directly; omitting period leaves no blank slot. features.state defaults to included, partial uses an amber cue, and excluded uses a red cross. All text is rendered with textContent.

schema.title?: string -- Section title; displays "Plans for every stage" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- One-line comparison description below the title; displays a plan-count summary when omitted
schema.plans: {name:string,description?:string,price:string,period?:string,badge?:string,highlight?:boolean,features:{label:string,state?:'included'|'excluded'|'partial',note?:string}[]}[] -- Plan array; highlight:true emphasizes the recommended card, badge is its short top label, and features.state defaults to included

_planFields.name: string -- Plan name
_planFields.description?: string -- Short statement of the plan's audience or positioning
_planFields.period?: string -- Price period, such as "/ user / month"
_planFields.badge?: string -- Label above a highlighted card; when omitted with highlight:true, displays "Most popular"
_planFields.highlight?: boolean -- Whether to emphasize the card with an accent border and top label

_featureFields.label: string -- Main benefit text
_featureFields.state?: 'included'|'excluded'|'partial' -- Default included; displays green included, red excluded, or amber Partial semantics
_featureFields.note?: string -- Short qualifier below the benefit

spec.note: Grows naturally with the heading and tallest plan card; desktop uses responsive side-by-side columns and narrow screens collapse to one column. No vh, fixed container height, or carrier-size measurement.
